statement: In every magma, Equation 1919 (`x = (y * (x * z)) * (w * w)`) implies Equation 4233 (`x * y = ((z * z) * z) * x`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0366
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op x z)) (op w w))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, (op x y) = (op (op (op z z) z) x)
